title: Data for Larivé et al, J. Virol. Meth, 2021 (doi 10.1016/j.jviromet.2021.114225)
author: Larivé, Odile
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw data (RT-qPCR, culturing, ICC-RTqPCR) pertaining to figures 2-5 in publication: 

 Larive et al.,  An integrated cell culture reverse transcriptase quantitative PCR (ICC-RTqPCR) method to simultaneously quantify the infectious concentrations of eight environmentally relevant enterovirus serotypes.  J Virol Methods, 2021.  

  https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jviromet.2021.114225  

 Explanations for each data set are given at the bottom of the respective csv file.
